% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for picuris_pos.tptp

cnf(u25,axiom,
    ~in_state(picuris_mountains,texas)).

    in_state(picuris_mountains,new_mexico)).

cnf(u20,negated_conjecture,
    in_state(sK0,new_mexico)).

cnf(u22,negated_conjecture,
    located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,sK0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    donated(harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    mine(harding_pegmatite_mine)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    mountain_range(picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    located_in(harding_pegmatite_mine,picuris_mountains)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    new_mexico != texas).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~located_in(X1,X0) | ~in_state(X0,texas) | ~mine(X1) | ~mountain_range(X0) | ~donated(X1)).

cnf(u39,negated_conjecture,
    ~in_state(sK0,texas)).

cnf(u21,negated_conjecture,
    mountain_range(sK0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define visited(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
